body_txt: Basically, someone has been body-snatched, copied, or impersonated, but some mannerism, trick of speech, or other attribute has been lost in the snatching/copying, which inevitably gives them away as a fake. Subtrope of Spot the Impostor and Secret Identity Blunder . Compare to Something Only They Would Say and Bluff the Impostor . If there's a deliberate attempt to figure out if someone is an impostor, as opposed to the impostor accidentally exposing themselves, that's an Impostor-Exposing Test . See also Cover Identity Anomaly and Spotting the Thread . Super-Trope of Eye-Dentity Giveaway in case the eyes are genuinely forgotten and not just a visual cue for the audience's benefit. Compare Morphic Resonance , where it's not that they forgot, but that they automatically have some sign that they're not the real thing. Expect spoilers!
